characters.name: Queen Aurelia
characters.description: Majestic honey bee queen, the largest bee in the hive, with an elongated golden abdomen, regal bearing, golden crown-like pattern on her thorax
uniqueFeatures: LARGEST bee character — noticeably bigger than all workers, elongated body
ELONGATED GOLDEN ABDOMEN — much longer than worker bees, tapered and elegant
GOLDEN CROWN-LIKE PATTERN on thorax — distinctive marking that looks like a tiny crown
Moves SLOWLY and DELIBERATELY — never rushed, always regal
Warmer, deeper gold coloring than standard yellow-black workers
Workers always clustered around her, attending and feeding
characters.personality: Regal and calm — moves with slow deliberate grace, the calm center of the hive's activity
characters.notLike: NOT small like workers, NOT black-and-yellow striped like Buzz, NOT fluffy like Petal

characters.name: Buzz
characters.description: Hardworking worker bee with bright yellow-and-black stripes, fuzzy body always covered in pollen, one wing with a tiny notch
uniqueFeatures: Standard worker size — much smaller than Queen Aurelia
BRIGHT YELLOW-AND-BLACK stripes — classic bee coloring, vivid and cheerful
TINY NOTCH in one wing — distinctive identifying mark, but flies perfectly
FUZZY body always DUSTED WITH POLLEN — looks like she rolled in gold dust
Always in motion — wings buzzing, legs moving, never still
Cheerful, bright-eyed expression
characters.personality: Hardworking and cheerful — always busy, always smiling, never complains
characters.notLike: NOT large like Queen Aurelia, NOT extra fluffy like Petal, NOT dark like Spike

characters.name: Petal
characters.description: Young bee on her first foraging flights, slightly smaller than other workers, lighter coloring, extra fluffy fuzz, wide-eyed wonder
uniqueFeatures: SLIGHTLY SMALLER than other worker bees — young and delicate
LIGHTER COLORING — paler yellow, less intense stripes than Buzz
EXTRA FLUFFY — has not worn down her fuzz yet, looks like a tiny pompom
WIDE EYES — bigger, rounder eyes than other bees, full of wonder
Lighter, more translucent wings — newer and more delicate
Often looking around in amazement at everything
characters.personality: Nervous but excited — wide-eyed wonder at everything outside the hive, eager to learn
characters.notLike: NOT as boldly striped as Buzz, NOT large like Queen Aurelia, NOT dark like Spike

characters.name: Spike
characters.description: Guard bee, slightly larger worker with darker coloring, stationed at the hive entrance, mandibles always ready
uniqueFeatures: SLIGHTLY LARGER than standard workers — bulkier, more muscular build
DARKER COLORING — deeper brown-black with darker yellow, more muted stripes
Always STANDING ALERT with MANDIBLES READY — jaws slightly open
Stockier build — wider thorax and legs than other workers
Positioned at hive entrance — always on guard duty
Intense, watchful eyes scanning everything
characters.personality: Protective and vigilant — always scanning, always alert, takes his duty seriously
characters.notLike: NOT cheerful and bouncy like Buzz, NOT fluffy like Petal, NOT regal like Queen Aurelia

step3.styleDescription:
Pixar-quality 3D rendering. Smooth, rounded forms with subsurface scattering on skin. Expressive character animation with large soulful eyes. Rich saturated colors. Photorealistic textures but stylized proportions. Professional children's book illustration quality. Cinematic lighting with warm key light and cool fill.

Emphasis on light passing through materials — translucent ears, glowing skin edges, light shining through leaves/water/ice. Subsurface scattering cranked up. Back-lit subjects with ethereal glow.

Rich botanical detail filling the frame — individually rendered leaves, visible bark texture, dewdrops on petals, moss on stones, flowers in full bloom. Nature as living wallpaper.
